label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by listing each person and their initial gift. Initially: - Alice has green present. - Bob has white present. - Claire has black ball. - Dave has orange ball. - Eve has yellow present. Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each swap step by step. First swap: Bob and Alice swap their gifts. After this swap: - Alice has white present (from Bob). - Bob has green present (from Alice). Others remain the same: Claire (black), Dave (orange), Eve (yellow). Second swap: Alice and Eve swap their gifts. After this swap: - Alice gives her white present to Eve, and takes Eve's yellow present. So now: - Alice has yellow present. - Eve has white present. Bob still has green, Claire has black, Dave has orange. Third swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. So Claire (black ball) swaps with Eve (white present). Now: - Claire has white present. - Eve has black ball. Others: Alice (yellow), Bob (green), Dave (orange). Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap their gifts. Alice (yellow) swaps with Dave (orange). Now: - Alice has orange. - Dave has yellow. Others: Bob (green), Claire (white), Eve (black). Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Bob (green) swaps with Eve (black). Now: - Bob has black ball. - Eve has green present. So at the end, Eve has the green present. Let me check again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. 1st swap: A & B → A: white, B: green 2nd swap: A & E → A: yellow, E: white 3rd swap: C & E → C: white, E: black 4th swap: A & D → A: orange, D: yellow 5th
